body.notes: Trail infra live (tails table, trail_id, sequence_pos). When two nodes co-activate in same trail, strengthen the edge between them in interpretive_edges or links_weighted. Use cortex.hot_paths() to find co-activation pairs. Gate: IGOR_TRAIL_TRAINING_ENABLED. Close #289.
body.title: T-trail-training: Hebbian edge strengthening from co-activation traces
body.result: hot_paths() PGRowProxy alias fix (AS node_a/node_b); _apply_trail_training wired into both search paths with STDP (LTP/LTD), configurable learning rate, creation threshold, max_weight; gated by IGOR_TRAIL_TRAINING_ENABLED=true. Prior session completed the code; this session verified and closed. Closes #289.
